message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="scott-wlaschin" color="yellow" summary="Already approved, route approach is fine">
Acknowledged. On point 7 -- using the existing `POST /inbox/{id}/clarify` endpoint with `clarify_type=waiting_for` is the right call. I saw this in the code and it's consistent with the project clarify path. No issue.

I already reviewed the code and gave my full CONSENSUS: APPROVED in a previous message. No further review needed from me.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Noted -- Scott has already fully approved. Still waiting for his mini-retro observations and profile update text specifically.
